ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vin" INTEGER /* Unique identification number for each vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the vehicle */,
  "option_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option set chosen for the vehicle */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "manufactured_plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Production status of the vehicle */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was shipped */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the vehicle's warranty period */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the vehicle's warranty period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_option_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_set_id") REFERENCES option_sets ("option_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufactured_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufactured_plant_id") REFERENCES manufactured_plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle model */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was first introduced */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine used in the vehicle model */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission used in the vehicle model */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive used in the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_sets" (
  "option_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option set */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the options included in the set */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the option set */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the option set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufactured_plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturing plant */,
  "plant_capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the manufacturing plant */,
  "plant_manager" TEXT /* Name of the plant manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "vin" INTEGER /* VIN of the vehicle in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of vehicles available */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (plant or dealership) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory record */,
  "last_vehicle_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was last inspected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vin" INTEGER /* VIN of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "dealership" TEXT /* Name of the dealership where the vehicle was sold */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "customer_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vin FOREIGN KEY ("vin") REFERENCES vehicles ("vin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealership FOREIGN KEY ("dealership") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealership_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "dealership_type" TEXT /* Type of dealership */,
  "dealership_manager" TEXT /* Name of the dealership manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "vin" INTEGER /* VIN of the vehicle */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of the production event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of production event (e.g., start, completion, shipment) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the production event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)
